name: qwen-copilot
description: Use Alibaba Qwen models as BYOK alternatives in GitHub Copilot

qwenCopilot.workspaceId.markdownDescription:
Your **DashScope Workspace ID** from the [Model Studio console](https://bailian.console.aliyun.com/).

Navigate to **Workspace Details** to find this value.

_Required for all regions._

qwenCopilot.region.markdownDescription:
**Alibaba Cloud Model Studio region** for API requests.

Your workspace must exist in this region.

qwenCopilot.baseUrl.patternErrorMessage: Must be a valid URL (starting with http:// or https://)
qwenCopilot.baseUrl.markdownDescription:
**Custom base URL override.**

Leave empty to use the region default. Only set this if you're using a proxy, private endpoint, or compatible API.

Example: `https://my-proxy.example.com/v1`

qwenCopilot.apiKey.markdownDescription:
**Deprecated — use the command instead.**

⚠️ Settings are stored as **plain text** and synced via Settings Sync. For security, set your API key via the `Qwen: Set API Key` command instead:

1. Open the Command Palette (`Cmd+Shift+P`)
2. Run **Qwen: Set API Key**
3. Your key will be stored securely in VS Code's Secret Storage

_This setting exists only as a fallback; the command is strongly recommended._
